recommendations.title: Choose or Die
recommendations.overview: In pursuit of an unclaimed $125,000 prize, a broke college dropout decides to play an obscure, 1980s survival computer game. But the game curses her, and she’s faced with dangerous choices and reality-warping challenges. After a series of unexpectedl

recommendations.title: The Furies
recommendations.overview: A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game — a game that can only have one winner.

recommendations.title: Ra.One
recommendations.overview: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

recommendations.title: Black Rain
recommendations.overview: Two New York cops get involved in a gang war between members of the Yakuza, the Japanese Mafia. They arrest one of their killers and are ordered to escort him back to Japan. However, in Japan he manages to escape, and as they try to track him down, t

recommendations.title: Redline
recommendations.overview: A daredevil driver is determined to compete in Redline, the most popular race in the galaxy. The race only occurs every five years, but in order to participate he must overcome the mafia, the government and even love.

recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Fauve
recommendations.overview: Set in a surface mine, two boys sink into a seemingly innocent power game with Mother Nature as the sole observer.

recommendations.title: Police Academy: Mission to Moscow
recommendations.overview: The Russians seek help in dealing with the Mafia from the veterans of the Police Academy. They head off to Moscow, in order to find evidence against Konstantin Konali, who marketed a computer game that everyone in the world is playing.

recommendations.title: The Jurassic Games
recommendations.overview: In the near future, 10 death row convicts are forced to compete in a virtual reality game that pits them against dinosaurs and each other.
